changes_summary: Rewrote init_build.py with full v2 orchestration support
Added v2 folder structure: BUILD.md, meta.json, workers/, completions/
Added --type flag supporting: code_build, content, research, general
Added --workers N flag to generate worker brief stubs
Added pre-screen logic that warns about incomplete builds
Maintained backward compatibility (old usage still works)

decisions.decision: Pre-screen shows ALL incomplete builds, not just similar ones
decisions.rationale: Complete visibility is more useful than filtering. Similar builds are marked with '← similar' for quick identification.

decisions.decision: Non-interactive mode warns but continues by default
decisions.rationale: Avoids breaking automated workflows. Use --strict to fail in CI/scripted contexts.

decisions.decision: Worker stubs default to wave 1 with sequential numbering
decisions.rationale: Most builds start with wave 1. The Architect can reorganize into multiple waves later.

decisions.decision: meta.json includes worker_details array when --workers used
decisions.rationale: Per W1.2's meta_schema.json, individual worker tracking is needed beyond aggregate stats.

backward_compatibility.notes: Old usage `python3 N5/scripts/init_build.py <slug> --title 'Title'` still works. Creates v2 structure with type=general and no worker stubs.

recommendations.recommendation: parse meta.json for status queries. Fall back to parsing STATUS.md for old builds without meta.json.
Update meta.json workers.complete count and worker_details[].status when marking a worker complete.
